name: Amber Heard

acts.description: US jury found she defamed Depp in a Washington Post op-ed; audio recordings suggest mutual physical altercations

behavior_summary: US jury found her liable for defamation after 2018 op-ed. Audio recordings released during trial suggest she also committed physical violence. UK court found Depp had committed abuse; she was a victim too in that proceeding.

art.summary: Mid-tier actress whose career has been largely defined by the Depp trial. Limited artistic legacy.

verdict.blurb: Found liable for defamation after accusing an abusive man of abuse. The internet turned the trial into a sport and she lost the public verdict by a landslide before the jury had breakfast. The truth is probably messier than either side wants.
